overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy video game (Elden Ring) showing a character riding a spectral white horse through a foggy, ancient landscape with stone ruins and lit lamp posts. The journey progresses from a path alongside ruins, through an open field with grazing animals, and up a narrow stone stairway flanked by hanging lanterns.

agents.ego_description: galloping on a spectral white horse along a dirt path beside tall stone ruins

entered.detail: tall ancient stone wall with weathered blocks running alongside the path
wooden post with warm glowing lantern illuminating the fog
large crumbling stone structures visible through the mist in the distance
rolling grassland extending into the foggy distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a rider on a spectral white horse galloping along a dirt path. A massive stone wall runs along the right side while open grassland extends to the left. Warm lanterns on wooden posts periodically appear along the path, and distant castle ruins are visible through the heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with scattered trees and grazing animals

events.description: exits the enclosed path beside the stone wall into a wide open grassland
grazing animals become visible scattered across the meadow to the left

agents.ego_description: galloping through open grassland, navigating around scattered trees and passing grazing animals

notable_agents.action: white sheep or similar livestock grazing peacefully in the field

entered.detail: tall thin trees with sparse foliage dotting the meadow landscape
small white animals grazing in the grass, visible through the fog
small wooden structures barely visible through the mist ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide meadow as the stone wall falls behind. The rider continues galloping across open grassland dotted with scattered trees. White grazing animals appear in the fields to the left, and distant farm buildings emerge from the fog ahead. The path remains visible as a dirt trail cutting through the grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone stairway canyon with overhead lanterns

events.description: enters a narrow canyon passage with steep rock walls on both sides
emerges from the enclosed stairway into slightly more open area at the top

agents.ego_description: riding up a steep stone stairway flanked by mossy rock walls and passing under hanging lanterns

entered.detail: tall moss-covered stone walls forming a narrow passage on both sides
metal lanterns suspended on thick ropes spanning the canyon overhead
weathered stone steps ascending steeply between the rock walls
tall wooden post with a lantern at the top, visible at the summit

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a narrow canyon with towering rock walls on both sides, transitioning from open field to enclosed stairway. Ancient stone steps ascend steeply upward, lit by warm lanterns hanging from ropes overhead. The horse climbs the stairs, and the segment ends as the rider emerges at the top near a wooden signpost, with distant buildings visible in the fog ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a rider on a spectral white horse travels from a foggy ruin-lined path through an open meadow and up into a narrow stone canyon. It begins with the horse galloping along a dirt path flanked by a massive stone wall and warm lanterns, with distant castle ruins shrouded in heavy fog. As the stone wall falls behind, the scene opens into a wide meadow where the rider crosses open grassland dotted with scattered trees and white grazing animals. The environment then shifts from the open field into a narrow canyon with towering rock walls, where the horse ascends a steep set of ancient stone steps lit by lanterns hanging from ropes. Finally, the rider emerges at the top of the stairway near a wooden signpost, facing distant buildings still veiled in the mist.
